ompi._comment_nfs_install: If nfs_install is true, OpenMPI and/or UCX (optional) will be installed in NFS. Otherwise, all nodes will have local installation of OpenMPI with or without UCX
ompi._comment_install_dir: Directory where ompi/ucx tarball is fectched, install is in ompi-5.0.10/install sub-directory under it.
ompi._comment_rocm_dir: ROCm installation path. Set to auto-detect from /opt/rocm or /opt/rocm/core-* if left as changeme
ompi._comment_ompi_url: OpenMPI tested tarball. Change it only if you know another working version, build may break.
ompi._comment_ucx_url: UCX tested tarball. Change it only if you know another working version, build may break.
ompi._comment_hwloc: Changing hwloc to point to an external tarball is not supported in the current version
ompi._comment_libevent: Changing libevent to point to an external tarball is not supported in the current version
ompi._comment_pmix: Changing pmix to point to an external tarball is not supported in the current version
ompi._comment_prrte: Changing prrte to point to an external tarball is not supported in the current version
